    add(Gold) - Method in record class fr.uge.items.Gold
    Merges two piles of gold into a new one.

    Adds a specific "Curse" item (debuff object) to the backpack.

    Adds energy to the hero, capped at 3.
    addGold(int) - Method in class fr.uge.BackPack
    Adds gold to the backpack.
    addItem(Item, Coordinate) - Method in class fr.uge.characters.Hero
    Adds an item to the backpack at a specific location.
    addMana(int) - Method in class fr.uge.characters.Hero
    Adds mana to the hero.

    Adds protection (shield) to the character.

    addScore(int) - Method in class fr.uge.characters.Hero
    Adds points to the hero's current score.

    Expands the backpack grid by unlocking a new slot at the specified coordinate.
